'''zanutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacance|vacance]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacance|vacance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zanutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zænitith|zænitith]] || [[word:zænitij|zænitij]] || [[word:zænitish|zænitish]] || [[word:zæniti|zæniti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zanunututh|zanunututh]] || [[word:zanunutuj|zanunutuj]] || [[word:zanunutush|zanunutush]] || [[word:zanunutu|zanunutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanututh|zanututh]] || [[word:zanutuj|zanutuj]] || [[word:zanutush|zanutush]] || [[word:zanutu|zanutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zanuftuth|zanuftuth]] || [[word:zanuftuj|zanuftuj]] || [[word:zanuftush|zanuftush]] || [[word:zanuftuf|zanuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zanututhu|zanututhu]] || [[word:zanutuju|zanutuju]] || [[word:zanutushu|zanutushu]] || [[word:zanutuku|zanutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zanututh|zanututh]] || [[word:zanutuj|zanutuj]] || [[word:zanutush|zanutush]] || [[word:zanutu|zanutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zanututhul|zanututhul]] || [[word:zanutujul|zanutujul]] || [[word:zanutushul|zanutushul]] || [[word:zanutukul|zanutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zanututhuthu|zanututhuthu]] || [[word:zanutujuju|zanutujuju]] || [[word:zanutushushu|zanutushushu]] || [[word:zanutuku|zanutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zanututhun|zanututhun]] || [[word:zanutujun|zanutujun]] || [[word:zanutushun|zanutushun]] || [[word:zanutukun|zanutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zanututhuoro|zanututhuoro]] || [[word:zanutujuoro|zanutujuoro]] || [[word:zanutushuoro|zanutushuoro]] || [[word:zanutukuoro|zanutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
